hero.question: Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by April 21st?
hero.prob_take: The crowd is pricing this at 14%, which means bettors think a formal Trump announcement of military pullback from Iran by April 21st is a near-impossible outcome, not just unlikely. Watch for any direct Trump-Iran communications or sudden shifts in Middle East escalation, if either happens, the market will gap higher instantly, but right now the price assumes status quo hostility continues.

daily_take.headline: Iran Escalation Flipped the Script. Smart Money Sees Opportunity at 14%.
daily_take.deck: A 14-point plunge in 24 hours screams panic selling, not fundamental repricing. The market is pricing in imminent conflict as base case, but Trump's actual incentive structure points the other way: he wants a deal, not another Middle East quagmire before 2026. At 14%, you're getting paid to bet on the boring outcome (negotiated pause or ceasefire announcement by April 21st). The sharp move is nibbling here.
